metadata.description: Presentation armory — 7 engines, 30 styles, progressive disclosure

plugins.name: slideaway
plugins.description: 7-engine presentation plugin with 30 curated styles, progressive disclosure skill architecture, anti-AI-slop heuristics, and opt-in style preview + refinement loops. Generates PPTX, HTML, reveal.js, Beamer, and Marp decks from natural language.
